title: Pink Modern Photo Diary Instagram Post

A.A: I'm savoring the beautiful view near my new home. I always enjoy watching the sunset with my pet.

My current favorite color
is this lovely shade of
light blue.
I dined at a stunning restaurant where I savored the most delightful cake, shared with friends.
Morning walks with my friends have been one of the highlights of this year. I’m looking forward to July!
